2606.22342.title: How Does Research Evolve? Tracing Cross-Domain Trajectories in NLP, ML, and CV with Claim-Grounded Typed Citations
2606.22342.paper_summary: How does research evolve, and what substrate would let us forecast where it goes next? Scientific progress is not simply a uniform accumulation of facts: ideas extend prior methods, address known limitations, realize proposed future directions, and sometimes dispute earlier claims. Existing citation graphs usually collapse these roles into a single homogeneous edge type, limiting how we can analyze scientific progress. We address this gap by proposing the SciTraj corpus, the first claim-grounded typed citation graph in which each edge is linked to the specific claim sentence that motivates it. Claim-bearing sentences are extracted from paper sections; four claim-driven relations are verified by NLI entailment against in-paper context, while two similarity-only relations are gated by abstract cosine and year-gap rules. SciTraj contains 32,559 papers from NLP, ML, and Vision (2015--2024), connected by 573,126 directed edges across six relation types, with NLI-verified claim seeds. Using SciTraj, we identify disciplinary siloing in typed citation flow and topic emergence concentrated in Vision and LLM-related work. The corpus also contains 287M typed trajectories of length $\geq 3$, covering 72.8% of papers, and supports a temporally split typed link-prediction benchmark. A year-shuffle falsifiability test separates temporal structure from year-correlated content, and a 3-annotator pilot reports $κ= 0.74$ with 79.9% precision.
2606.22342.paper_summary_zh: 如何研究演變，以及什麼樣的基礎可以讓我們預測它接下來的方向？科學進步不僅僅是事實的均勻累積：想法延伸了先前的方法，解決已知的限制，實現提出的未來方向，有時還會質疑早期的主張。現有的引用圖通常將這些角色合併為單一的均質邊緣類型，限制了我們分析科學進步的方式。我們通過提出SciTraj語料庫來解決這一空白，這是第一個基於主張的類型化引用圖，其中每條邊都與激勵它的具體主張句子相連。承載主張的句子是從論文部分提取的；四種驅動主張的關係通過NLI推理在論文上下文中進行驗證，而兩種僅基於相似性的關係則受到抽象餘弦和年份差距規則的限制。SciTraj包含來自NLP、ML和視覺領域的32,559篇論文（2015--2024），通過573,126條有向邊連接，涵蓋六種關係類型，並有NLI驗證的主張種子。使用SciTraj，我們識別出類型化引用流中的學科孤立現象，以及集中在視覺和LLM相關工作的主題出現。該語料庫還包含287M條長度$\geq 3$的類型化軌跡，覆蓋72.8%的論文，並支持一個時間分割的類型化鏈接預測基準。一個年份隨機化的可證偽性測試將時間結構與年份相關內容分開，而一個由3位評註者進行的試點報告顯示$κ= 0.74$，精確度為79.9%。
2606.22342.author: Abdul Muntakim et.al.
2606.22342.authors: Abdul Muntakim, Md Abdullah Al Hafiz Khan, Sadid Hasan, Yong Pei
